title: Bushy Hazel Oak
description: A warm and earthy take on the classic oak, this bushy texture introduces dense foliage with soft hazel hues, evoking a cozy, late-summer forest vibe. Perfect for naturalistic and grounded builds.
body:
**Bushy Hazel Oak**

This oak variant reimagines the classic Minecraft tree with a soft, hazel-toned palette and a fuller, more organic shape. The leaves are tinted in gentle browns and muted olive-greens, giving the tree a sun-drenched, late-summer forest vibe. The bushy foliage style adds depth and realism by creating denser clusters of leaves with layered shading and natural gaps. This makes each tree feel wild and overgrown, ideal for cozy villages, enchanted woods, or rustic builds. It’s a grounded, earthy look that retains the familiarity of vanilla oak while offering a warmer, more immersive aesthetic.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
